name: Cherry Upsidedown Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread cherry pie filling over the bottom of a 9 x 13 pan.
2. In a large bowl, stir together flour, sugar, cocoa, baking powder, and salt.
3. In another bowl, combine water, oil, vinegar, and vanilla.
4. Add the liquid to the dry ingredients all at once, stirring just until moistened.
5. Pour the batter evenly over the cherry filling in the pan.
6. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 30-35 minutes.
7. Let cool for 10 minutes in the pan, then carefully invert onto a plate and allow to cool further.
